mainStory.title: Three Major Bounties for Mr. O, a Known Pyro Swindler, Set to Post on Saturday
mainStory.subtitle: Mr. O has become the face of a swath of deadly incidents surrounding the large-scale sale of contaminated Valakkar eggs that were being sold as Weevil eggs throughout the Pyro System. A manhunt is expected to begin near Jackson’s Swap on Monox this Saturday after the bounties post.
mainStory.author: Kaveh Virtanen | Military Correspondent
mainStory.content:
Mr. O, an established con-man, has become the number one hunted criminal in the Pyro System after flooding the Pyro market with contaminated Valakkar eggs, successfully passing off the eggs as a new strain of Weevil egg. This spurred a simultaneous collapse of the lucrative egg trade in Pyro and the death of dozens of Pyro citizens, causing the local crime syndicates to immediately begin mobilization against him. Mr. O went into hiding shortly after the eggs were sold but before the eggs were found to be fraudulent.

The tipping point that caused this hunt was the death of an entire syndicate crew on a routine hauling route through Pyro. According to Jump Point Network’s (JPN) initial broadcast, a cargo vessel was found drifting in Pyro space after a syndicate leader purchased a shipment of weevil eggs and was intent on using the most direct shipping route. The route ran the vessel near to the Pyro star and rapidly increased the internal temperature of the cargo bays. This temperature change led the fraudulent weevil eggs, now confirmed to be contaminated Valakkar Eggs, to hatch within the hull and release an unknown amount of Valakkar larva inside of the vessel. According to the report, the syndicate security team on board the vessel was one of the best teams in Pyro and all lost their lives during the short transit.

Authorities within the United Earth Empire (UEE) Advocacy, the Bounty Hunter’s Guild, as well as the leadership from multiple syndicates in Pyro have placed separate bounties on Mr. O’s head due to these recent events, and all parties want him captured alive for vastly different purposes. Unaffiliated bounty hunters, mercenary groups, and private militaries are all converging on Pyro to begin the search and collect the bounty.

Each group has different goals for the manhunt, but each wishes to bring Mr. O into custody in their own way. The UEE Advocacy published their intentions alongside their official bounty announcement, stating that they wish to interrogate Mr. O to find the source of the contaminated Valakkar Eggs that they deem to be a bio-weapon. The crime syndicates want to make an example of Mr. O for the deaths of their security team on the transport but also the deaths of the innocent citizens from the mass sale of the eggs. Finally, the bounty hunters guild wishes to profit from both the crime syndicates as well as the UEE Advocacy in order to see Mr. O behind bars.

HLN News spoke with JPN regarding the issue and clarified some details. Every party involved wants Mr. O captured alive and due to the differing lines of effort and separate bounties, no singular group has control over how the operation may take place. JPN also released the last known coordinates of Mr. O to the public on Spectrum as a neutral party and alongside a cryptic message about chaos sorting itself out in the end.

JPN also provided us a detailed profile on Mr. O and we have independently confirmed the truthfulness of the information. Mr. O is an opportunist and a con-man. Unfortunately, with the money he received from the recent sales, he has hired a large mercenary force to defend himself and his assets. According to the provided reports, Mr. O was a deep informant for the UEE Advocacy in Pyro in the distant past and went rogue after working with them for a short amount of time.

It is assessed at this time by both JPN and HLN News that Mr. O is likely to take one of two routes if captured. Mr. O likely understands that his position ends in significant interrogation at best, and being made an example by the Pyro crime syndicates at worst. Mr. O’s most likely course of action will be to ensure that the bounty hunters and mercenaries coming to get him fight each other instead of cooperating to capture him alive. His secondary course of action, if he is actually caught, will be to bribe or purchase his way out of custody. Mr. O instructed his mercenaries to slowly place lockboxes full of aUEC throughout Stanton so that he can both send mercenary groups away in pursuit of the money and also pay off the groups that are hunting him by giving the codes and coordinates.

Because of the multiple bounties and very few of the invested parties working together for the manhunt, HLN News believes that this will be another deadly incident in Pyro’s history. We recommend that anyone travelling through the Pyro system this weekend shelter in place or leave the area near Monox for a few days. As always, HLN News will monitor the traffic surrounding this development and will update everyone as we have more information.

quickUpdates.title: Overloaded Refinery Capacity Throughout Stanton
quickUpdates.summary: Due to the sudden increase of mining in the Stanton System, many Stanton System refineries are reporting that there will be delays for any new incoming orders.

quickUpdates.title: Customs Between Pyro and Stanton Increasing Security
quickUpdates.summary: The security office at the Stanton Gateway in the Pyro System released a notice regarding heightened searches of cargo being transferred through their station.

quickUpdates.title: Maintenance Alerts at Many Stations Throughout the UEE
quickUpdates.summary: A slew of downtime reports across the UEE began appearing this week after a critical maintenance supply shipment was interdicted by pirates in an inner system.
